label: Soil sensor temperature unit
items: Soil temperature is now read correctly from the WH52. Previously the gateway was sending °F without a unit label, and Rhozly was storing 70°F as 70°C. The parser now uses the unit info from the Ecowitt response (or, if missing, assumes anything above 50 is °F since soil temperatures in °C don't reach that).

New per-sensor display unit preference. Open Device Settings on a soil sensor and pick Celsius or Fahrenheit. Default is Celsius. Storage is always Celsius, so switching the display later doesn't touch historical data — both the live tile and the history chart re-render in your chosen unit.
